description: Block orders for prescription medicines without verification
message_template: {medicine} requires a valid prescription. Please upload or verify your prescription.

description: Ensure medicine is in stock before order
message_template: Sorry {medicine} is currently out of stock. Expected restock: {restock_date}

description: Alert when stock below reorder level
message_template: Low stock alert: {medicine} has {current_stock} units remaining (reorder level: {reorder_level})

description: Maximum quantity per order for controlled items
message_template: Maximum order quantity for {medicine} is {limit} units per order

description: Warn if customer has known allergy
message_template: ⚠️ Warning: You have a recorded allergy to {allergen}. {medicine} may cause adverse reactions. Please consult your doctor.
⚠️ Potential interaction: {medicine} may interact with {interacting_drug}. Consult your pharmacist.

description: Prevent early refills of controlled substances
message_template: Your last order of {medicine} was {days_ago} days ago. Refills allowed after {min_days} days.
Reminder: Based on your condition ({condition}) you may need to refill {medicine} soon.
Order of {quantity} units of {medicine} requires pharmacist approval.
